changes.before: "No," Sylvanas said. She stopped with the well curb to one side and the common house at her back... The captain's jaw set. Work-rough hands folded over each other...
changes.after: "No," Sylvanas said, stopping with the well curb to one side and the common house at her back... The captain's jaw set, his work-rough hands folding over each other...
changes.rationale: Captain exchange was flagged as a telegram run; added connective tissue without softening Sylvanas's clipped pressure.

changes.before: "My wife keeps the storehouse accounts." He jerked his chin toward the square... No wasted reassurance. No promise this would end well.
changes.after: "My wife keeps the storehouse accounts," he said, jerking his chin toward the square... No wasted reassurance, and no promise this would end well.
changes.rationale: Folded two flat resets into moving sentences while keeping the scene's authority dynamics intact.

changes.before: "Fever by the third day in most cases. Sweating..." "She came in yesterday evening. Walked here on her own."
changes.after: "Fever by the third day in most cases, and sweating with it..." "She came in yesterday evening and walked here on her own."
changes.rationale: Infirmary intake needed one joined symptom line before the clipped fragments.

changes.after: The contamination answered at once, flaring through the crystal before she had settled her second breath.
changes.rationale: Linked diagnosis to Jaina's first question so the read feels procedural rather than stepwise.

changes.before: Jaina went bed to bed with the crystal, fifteen seconds at each, no treatment yet, only pattern. ... Only a shadow in the stomach, early enough to matter. Jaina fed a narrow stabilizing ward through it.
changes.after: Jaina went bed to bed with the crystal, giving each body fifteen seconds—no treatment yet, only pattern. ... Only a shadow in the stomach, early enough to matter, and Jaina fed a narrow stabilizing ward through it.
changes.rationale: Threaded the bed-to-bed checks so the room moves as one continuous procedure.

changes.before: "Grain," Jaina said. ... Jaina glanced at the ledger. Dates marched down the page...
changes.after: "Grain," Jaina said, and Sylvanas answered at the same time. ... Jaina glanced at the ledger, dates marching down the page...
changes.rationale: Fused the ledger handoff to Sylvanas's supplier summary, reducing another hard reset.

changes.before: Instead she felt the speed of it—the ugly efficiency. The village had gone on baking... Not proof of identity. Not yet.
changes.after: Instead she felt the speed of it—the ugly efficiency—and the village had gone on baking... Not proof of identity, not yet...
changes.rationale: Turned the realization beat into one flow instead of three detached judgments.

changes.before: "It's in all eight sacks," she said... Aldous stopped dead in the doorway. ... No one moved for half a breath. Then motion flickered in the loading alcove.
changes.after: "It's in all eight sacks," she said... Aldous stopped dead in the doorway when she said it. ... No one moved for half a breath; then motion flickered in the loading alcove.
changes.rationale: Connected diagnosis to reaction and interruption, tightening the sack-reading sequence.

changes.before: Jaina eased one step sideways... His gaze jumped... "Watching." ... "Anything else," Jaina said. "Horse. Height. A mark." ... "If I get caught." The words scraped out of him. "He said to be fast."
changes.after: Jaina eased one step sideways..., keeping Sylvanas in the edge of his sight. His gaze jumped... "Watching." ... "Anything else," Jaina said, leaning in a fraction. "Horse. Height. A mark." ... "If I get caught"—the words scraped out of him—"he said to be fast."
changes.rationale: Added connective motion through the interrogation while preserving Jaina's urgency and Davan's fragmented speech.

changes.before: Warm still, a bare trace of foam at the mouth... The crystal's light went cold in her hands. She sat back on her heels. Sylvanas crouched beside the body without touching it.
changes.after: Warm still, a bare trace of foam at the mouth... and by the time she found it she already knew she was late. The crystal's light went cold in her hands, and she sat back on her heels. Sylvanas crouched beside the body without touching it, checking the mouth...
changes.rationale: Closet aftermath needed connective tissue through failure, assessment, and Sylvanas's read.

changes.before: "Capsule," she said. "He took it when we walked him in."
changes.after: "Capsule," she said, checking the cuff seam again. "He took it when we walked him in."
changes.rationale: Joined the explanation to the physical evidence instead of leaving it as isolated dialogue beats.

changes.before: "Tomorrow evening at the latest, the worst cases will need renewing. The lighter ones may carry longer if the bread stops now."
changes.after: "Tomorrow evening at the latest, the worst cases will need renewing, though the lighter ones may carry longer if the bread stops now."
changes.rationale: Blended the ward-duration explanation into the departure decision, reducing one more short-sentence chain.
